headline: Chip Stocks Surge but Software Sector Feels the Pain Again
summary: Technology stocks were surging early Tuesday but the beaten-down software sector was only enduring more pain as the artificial-intelligence trade sparked back into life. Chip stocks, including Intel, Micron and Marvell were among the biggest risers ahead of the open, along with memory storage names Sandisk and Western Digital.

content.title: Chip Stocks Surge but Software Sector Feels the Pain Again
content.summary: Technology stocks were surging early Tuesday but the beaten-down software sector was only enduring more pain as the artificial-intelligence trade sparked back into life. Chip stocks, including Intel, Micron and Marvell were among the biggest risers ahead of the open, along with memory storage names Sandisk and Western Digital.

headline: Seagate, Western Digital, FormFactor, Amkor, and Teradyne Shares Are Soaring, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the morning session after dip buyers returned to the market to capitalize on more attractive valuations following the sector's steep selloff in the previous week, driven by continued optimism surrounding the long-term artificial intelligence investment cycle. The recovery comes after a sharp decline that briefly pushed semiconductor powerhouses into bear market territory, marking their worst weekly drop in over a year. headline: Markets News, July 21, 2026: Major Indexes Rise to Snap 3-Day Losing Streak as Chip, Memory Stocks Soar
summary: Major stock indexes closed higher Tuesday following three consecutive sessions of losses, as tech stocks powered gains. Meanwhile, WTI oil prices rose to their highest level in more than five weeks.

content.title: Markets News, July 21, 2026: Major Indexes Rise to Snap 3-Day Losing Streak as Chip, Memory Stocks Soar
content.summary: Major stock indexes closed higher Tuesday following three consecutive sessions of losses, as tech stocks powered gains. Meanwhile, WTI oil prices rose to their highest level in more than five weeks.
